name: Lentil Loaf
recipeIngredient: Lotsa thyme, oregano, tarragon. Some cumin, curry powder, and pepper
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the brown lentils in 6 cups of water with a bay leaf for about 45 minutes.
2. Cook the bulgur wheat in 2 cups of water for about 15 minutes.
3. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
4. In a large bowl, mix together the cooked lentils, cooked bulgur, bread crumbs, egg whites or egg substitute, catsup, onions, garlic, thyme, oregano, tarragon, cumin, curry powder, pepper, tomato sauce, and barbecue sauce.
5. Transfer the mixture to a sprayed loaf pan, casserole dish, or similar container.
6. Bake for about 40 minutes. The dish may come out more of a scoop-and-serve consistency than sliced slices.
Note: Next time you make this recipe, consider adding some cooked carrots, potatoes, and peas for added color and texture.
